author: AI Agent
text: Ambiguous which format to follow: LICHEN draft uses simplified RuleID | W | Bitmap (1=missing); RFC uses W | C bit with compressed bitmap only on C=0 and implicit size from Rule. Current code is hybrid with extra length byte. Recommendation: Follow LICHEN draft for this project as primary spec. Escalate for confirmation before changing wire format (affects interop with Zephyr C impl and test vectors).
